  properties:

      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center

      paddingBlock: xs
      paddingInline: md
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: fit
        horizontalAlign: center
        direction: row
      spacing:
        gap: sm
    components:

      properties:
        icon: star

          color: '#ffffff'

        size: '36'
        strokeWidth: '2'
        color: '#4f46e5'

      properties:
        text: Free shipping on all orders over $50 — Limited time only!
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: semibold
          color: '#4f46e5'
          align: center
          lineHeight: '1.6'
          transform: none
          letterSpacing: normal
          fontStyle: normal
          textDecoration: none
        layout:
          widthMode: fit
        appearance:

          paddingBlock: sm
          paddingInline: none
          marginBlock: none
          marginInline: none

        text: Shop Now →
        url: '#shop'

          size: sm
          weight: bold

          align: left
          lineHeight: '1.5'

          letterSpacing: normal

          textDecoration: none

metadata.template_title: Top Announcement Bar - Slim Site-Wide Notice Banner
metadata.template_description: A compact, single-row announcement strip with centered text and optional action link, designed to sit at the very top of a page for site-wide notices like free shipping thresholds, new feature launches, or limited-time offers
metadata.template_use_cases: online store, SaaS platform, fashion brand, tech startup, restaurant, event venue, hotel, university website
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, paragraph, link, icon

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        type: gradient
        gradient:
          colorStart: '#7c3aed'
          colorEnd: '#ec4899'
          direction: to right
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
        horizontalAlign: center
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: LIMITED TIME OFFER
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: bold
          color: '#fde68a'
          align: center
          letterSpacing: wider
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Spring Sale — Up to 60% Off Everything
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
          lineHeight: '1.1'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Refresh your wardrobe with our biggest sale of the season. Hundreds
          of styles marked down. Don't miss out — offer ends Sunday.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#e9d5ff'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Browse Deals
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
          radius: lg
        typography:
          color: '#7c3aed'
          weight: bold
          size: md
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md

metadata.template_title: Promotional Banner - Full Width Gradient Sale Announcement
metadata.template_description: A bold, full-width promotional banner with vibrant gradient background, oversized heading, supporting description paragraph, and a prominent call-to-action button designed to capture attention for seasonal sales, product launches, or major promotions
metadata.template_use_cases: online store, SaaS platform, fashion brand, tech startup, restaurant, event venue, hotel, university website
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, button

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
      wrap: nowrap
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#1e293b'
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: left
    components:
    - name: badge
      properties:
        text: COMING SOON
        variant: warning
        pill: true
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Something Big Is Launching
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#f8fafc'
          lineHeight: '1.2'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: We've been working on something incredible. Be the first to experience
          our next-generation platform when the countdown hits zero.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#94a3b8'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: center
    components:
    - name: countdown
      properties:
        targetDate: '2026-09-15T00:00:00'
        format: DD:HH:MM:SS
        expiredText: We're live!
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Get Early Access
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#f59e0b'
          radius: md
        typography:
          color: '#1e293b'
          weight: bold
          size: md
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md

metadata.template_title: Split Image Announcement - Product or Event Reveal with Photo
metadata.template_description: A 50/50 split-screen announcement banner with a striking product image on the left and an eyebrow label, bold heading, descriptive paragraph, and prominent CTA button on the right, ideal for new product reveals, event promotions, or feature announcements
metadata.template_use_cases: online store, SaaS platform, fashion brand, tech startup, restaurant, event venue, hotel, university website

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
      wrap: nowrap
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f1f5f9'
        transparency: 100
      border:
        width: 1px
        color: '#e2e8f0'
      radius: md
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: sm
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: stretch
        horizontalAlign: left
        direction: row
        verticalAlign: center
      spacing:
        gap: sm
    components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        icon: lock
        appearance:
          color: '#64748b'
          size: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: We use cookies to improve your experience on our site. By continuing
          to browse, you agree to our use of cookies.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#64748b'
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: fit
        horizontalAlign: right
        direction: row
      spacing:
        gap: sm
    components:
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Decline
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: md
        typography:
          color: '#64748b'
          weight: medium
          size: sm
        border:
          width: 1px
          color: '#cbd5e1'
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Accept All
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#2563eb'
          radius: md
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: semibold
          size: sm

metadata.template_title: Cookie Consent Privacy Notice Banner - Bottom Page Notification
metadata.template_description: A compact, bottom-anchored privacy notice banner with a brief cookie usage explanation paragraph and two side-by-side action buttons (Accept and Decline), using subtle muted styling and small text for unobtrusive legal compliance
metadata.template_use_cases: online store, SaaS platform, fashion brand, tech startup, restaurant, event venue, hotel, university website
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, paragraph, button, icon

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      wrap: nowrap
      gap: none
      verticalAlign: stretch
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: start
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 100
        radius: lg
        shadow: soft
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: GET IN TOUCH
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: bold
          color: '#3b82f6'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Contact Us
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#1e293b'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Have a question or want to work together? Fill out the form below and
          we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#64748b'
          lineHeight: '1.6'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: form
      properties:
        layout:
          style: vertical
        submit:
          show: false
      components:
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Full Name
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: name
            placeholder: John Doe
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#3b82f6'
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Email Address
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: email
            placeholder: john@example.com
            validation: email
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#3b82f6'
      - name: dropdown
        properties:
          label:
            text: Subject
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: subject
            placeholder: Choose a topic
            options: 'General

              Support

              Partnership

              Other'
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#3b82f6'
      - name: textarea
        properties:
          label:
            text: Message
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: message
            placeholder: Tell us how we can help...
            rows: 5
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#3b82f6'
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Send Message
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#3b82f6'
              transparency: 100
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: xl
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: center
        gap: md
      appearance: null
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: start
          widthMode: stretch

metadata.template_use_cases: consulting firm, law firm, dental clinic, real estate agency, digital agency, photography studio, architecture firm, accounting firm, tutoring center, wellness center
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, columnsgrid, layout-column, heading, paragraph, caption, icon, button, eyebrow

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
      wrap: nowrap
      gap: lg
      verticalAlign: start
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: start
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 100
        radius: lg
        shadow: soft
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: mail
        size: '36'
        color: '#6366f1'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Send Us a Message
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#1e293b'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Fill out the form and our team will respond as soon as possible.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#64748b'
          lineHeight: '1.6'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: form
      properties:
        layout:
          style: vertical
        submit:
          show: false
      components:
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Name
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: name
            placeholder: Your full name
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#6366f1'
      - name: textbox
        properties:
          label:
            text: Email
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: email
            placeholder: you@example.com
            validation: email
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#6366f1'
      - name: dropdown
        properties:
          label:
            text: Topic
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: topic
            placeholder: Select a topic
            options: 'General Inquiry

              Technical Support

              Billing

              Feature Request

              Other'
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#6366f1'
      - name: textarea
        properties:
          label:
            text: Message
            show: true
            typography:
              weight: medium
              color: '#1e293b'
          field:
            name: message
            placeholder: Describe your question or issue...
            rows: 5
            required: true
          appearance:
            size: sm
            accentColor: '#6366f1'
      - name: button
        properties:
          text: Submit
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#6366f1'
              transparency: 100
            radius: md
          typography:
            color: '#ffffff'
            weight: semibold
            size: md
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
            paddingBlock: sm
            paddingInline: xl
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: start
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 100
        radius: lg
        shadow: soft
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: lg
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: help-circle
        size: '36'
        color: '#6366f1'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Common Questions
        level: 2
        typography:
# ... (truncated, 1 total components)

metadata.template_title: Contact Form with FAQ Accordion Section
metadata.template_description: A split-screen contact section combining a form on the left with a frequently asked questions accordion on the right, reducing support queries by answering common questions
metadata.template_use_cases: consulting firm, law firm, dental clinic, real estate agency, digital agency, photography studio, architecture firm, accounting firm, tutoring center, wellness center
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, form, textbox, textarea, dropdown, accordion, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, icon

content:
- name: site
  properties:
    theme:
      fonts:
        heading: '''Inter'', sans-serif'
        content: '''Inter'', sans-serif'
      colors:
        primary: '#1e293b'
        text: '#343A45'
        secondary: '#64748b'
        accent: '#6366f1'
        background: '#ffffff'
  components:
  - name: page
    slug: home
    title: 04 Contact With FAQ
    properties:
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          wrap: nowrap
          gap: lg
          verticalAlign: start
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#f8fafc'
            transparency: 100
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxxl
          paddingInline: xl
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            widthMode: '50'
            horizontalAlign: start
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#ffffff'
              transparency: 100
            radius: lg
            shadow: soft
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: mail
            size: '36'
            color: '#6366f1'
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Send Us a Message
            level: 2
            typography:
              size: xl
              weight: bold
              color: '#1e293b'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Fill out the form and our team will respond as soon as possible.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: form
          properties:
            layout:
              style: vertical
            submit:
              show: false
          components:
          - name: textbox
            properties:
              label:
                text: Name
                show: true
                typography:
                  weight: medium
                  color: '#1e293b'
              field:
                name: name
                placeholder: Your full name
                required: true
              appearance:
                size: sm
                accentColor: '#6366f1'
          - name: textbox
            properties:
              label:
                text: Email
                show: true
                typography:
                  weight: medium
                  color: '#1e293b'
              field:
                name: email
                placeholder: you@example.com
                validation: email
                required: true
              appearance:
                size: sm
                accentColor: '#6366f1'
          - name: dropdown
            properties:
              label:
                text: Topic
                show: true
                typography:
                  weight: medium
                  color: '#1e293b'
              field:
                name: topic
                placeholder: Select a topic
                options: 'General Inquiry

                  Technical Support

                  Billing

                  Feature Request

                  Other'
                required: true
              appearance:
                size: sm
                accentColor: '#6366f1'
          - name: textarea
            properties:
              label:
                text: Message
                show: true
                typography:
                  weight: medium
                  color: '#1e293b'
              field:
                name: message
                placeholder: Describe your question or issue...
                rows: 5
                required: true
              appearance:
                size: sm
                accentColor: '#6366f1'
          - name: button
            properties:
              text: Submit
              appearance:
                background:
                  color: '#6366f1'
                  transparency: 100
                radius: md
              typography:
                color: '#ffffff'
                weight: semibold
                size: md
              spacing:
                marginBlock: sm
                paddingBlock: sm
                paddingInline: xl
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            widthMode: '50'
            horizontalAlign: start
          appearance:
            background:
              color: '#ffffff'
              transparency: 100
            radius: lg
            shadow: soft
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: lg
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: help-circle
            size: '36'
            color: '#6366f1'
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Common Questions
            level: 2
            typography:
              size: xl
              weight: bold
              color: '#1e293b'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Find quick answers to the most frequently asked questions below.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.6'
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
        - name: accordion
          properties:
            behavior:
              allowMultipleOpen: true
            typography:
              title:
                size: md
                weight: semibold
                color: '#1e293b'
              content:
                size: sm
                weight: regular
                color: '#64748b'
            appearance:
              border:
                position: bottom
            layout:
              widthMode: stretch
            spacing:
              marginBlock: sm
          items:
          - title: What are your support hours?
            components:
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Our support team is available Monday through Friday, 9am to
                  6pm EST. For urgent issues outside business hours, please email
                  urgent@company.com.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#64748b'
                  lineHeight: '1.6'
          - title: How quickly will I get a response?
            components:
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours on business
                  days. Priority support customers receive responses within 4 hours.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#64748b'
                  lineHeight: '1.6'
          - title: Can I schedule a demo or consultation?
            components:
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Absolutely! Select 'General Inquiry' in the contact form and
                  mention you'd like a demo. Our sales team will reach out to schedule
                  a convenient time.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#64748b'
                  lineHeight: '1.6'
          - title: Do you offer phone support?
            components:
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Phone support is available for Business and Enterprise plan
                  customers. You can reach us at +1 (555) 123-4567 during business
                  hours.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#64748b'
                  lineHeight: '1.6'
          - title: How do I report a bug or request a feature?
            components:
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Use the contact form with the 'Technical Support' or 'Feature
                  Request' topic. Include as much detail as possible, including screenshots
                  if applicable, so we can address your feedback quickly.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#64748b'
                  lineHeight: '1.6'

metadata.template_title: Contact Form with FAQ Accordion Section
metadata.template_description: A split-screen contact section combining a form on the left with a frequently asked questions accordion on the right, reducing support queries by answering common questions
metadata.template_use_cases: consulting firm, law firm, dental clinic, real estate agency, digital agency, photography studio, architecture firm, accounting firm, tutoring center, wellness center
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, form, textbox, textarea, dropdown, accordion, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, icon

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      align: center
      wrap: wrap
    appearance:
      background:
        type: gradient
        gradient:
          colorStart: '#1e293b'
          colorEnd: '#0f172a'
          direction: to right
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'
        horizontalAlign: center
        align: center
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: NEWSLETTER
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: bold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Stay Updated
        level: 2
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#ffffff'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Get the latest news, product updates, and exclusive insights delivered
          straight to your inbox. No spam, unsubscribe anytime.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#e2e8f0'
          align: center
          lineHeight: '1.6'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: form
      properties:
        layout:
          style: inline
        submit:
          show: false
      components:
      - name: textbox

        paddingInline: xl

        text: NEW
        variant: success
        pill: true
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Ready to Transform Your Business?
        level: 1

          color: '#111827'
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          lineHeight: '1.15'

          marginBlock: sm

          widthMode: stretch
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'Our platform empowers teams to move faster, collaborate smarter, and
          deliver

content:

  properties:

      paddingInline: lg
  components:

    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
        horizontalAlign: center
    components:

      properties:
        text: FLASH SALE
        variant: danger
        pill: true
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Don't Miss Out — 50% Off Everything
        level: 1
        typography:
          color: '#f8fafc'
          size: xxxl
          weight: bold
          align: center
          letterSpacing: tight
          lineHeight: '1.1'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md

          widthMode: stretch

      properties:
        targetDate: '2026-12-31T23:59:59'
        format: DD:HH:MM:SS

        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#f8fafc'
          align: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'Use code FLASH50 at checkout. Applies to all products sitewide.

          Free shipping on orders over $50. Limited stock available — act now before
          it''s gone.

          '
        typography:
          color: '#94a3b8'
          size: md
          align: center
          lineHeight: '1.7'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: xxl
        layout:
          widthMode: '75'
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Shop Now
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#f43f5e'
            transparency: 100
          border:
            width: 0
            style: solid
            color: transparent
          radius: pill
          shadow: elevated
          shadowColor: '#f43f5e'
        typography:
          color: '#f8fafc'
          weight: bold
          size: lg
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md

metadata.template_title: Categorized Tabs FAQ Section — Organized by Topic
metadata.template_description: A FAQ section using tabs to organize questions into categories with each tab containing an accordion of topic-specific question-answer pairs for easy navigation
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, online store, consulting firm, dental clinic, law firm, tutoring center, real estate agency, insurance company, software company, subscription service
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, tabs, accordion, heading, paragraph, eyebrow

content:
- name: site
  properties:
    theme:
      fonts:
        heading: '''Inter'', sans-serif'
        content: '''Inter'', sans-serif'
      colors:
        primary: '#0f172a'
        text: '#2B2F3B'
        secondary: '#64748b'
        accent: '#8b5cf6'
        background: '#fafafe'
  components:
  - name: page
    slug: home
    title: 02 Categorized Tabs FAQ
    properties:
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#fafafe'
      spacing:
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
          gap: md
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#fafafe'
            transparency: 100
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxl
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: eyebrow
        properties:
          text: HELP CENTER
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: semibold
            color: '#8b5cf6'
            transform: uppercase
            letterSpacing: wider
            align: center
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Find Answers by Topic
          level: 2
          typography:
            size: xxxl
            weight: extrabold
            color: '#0f172a'
            align: center
            letterSpacing: tight
            lineHeight: '1.2'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Browse our most frequently asked questions organized by category.
            Select a topic below to find the answers you need.
          typography:
            size: md
            color: '#64748b'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
          layout:
            widthMode: '66'
      - name: tabs
        properties:
          layout:
            orientation: horizontal
            widthMode: '75'
          typography:
            label:
              size: sm
              weight: semibold
              active:
                color: '#8b5cf6'
              inactive:
                color: '#64748b'
          appearance:
            tab:
              background:
                active: '#fafafe'
                inactive: '#fafafe'
              border:
                width: 2
                style: solid
                position: lower
            content:
              background:
                color: '#fafafe'
                transparency: 100
              padding:
                block: lg
                inline: md
            shadow: none
          spacing:
            marginBlock: md
        tabs:
        - title: Getting Started
          components:
          - name: accordion
            properties:
              behavior:
                allowMultipleOpen: false
              appearance:
                border:
                  position: bottom
                radius: sm
            items:
            - title: How do I create an account?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Click the "Sign Up" button on our homepage and fill in your
                    email, name, and password. You'll receive a verification email
                    within minutes. Once verified, you can start using the platform
                    immediately.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: What are the system requirements?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Our platform runs entirely in the browser, so you just need
                    a modern web browser like Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge. We
                    support the latest two versions of each browser. No software installation
                    required.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: Is there an onboarding tutorial?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Yes! After signing up, you'll be guided through an interactive
                    onboarding tour that covers all the key features. We also have
                    a comprehensive video library and documentation center available
                    at any time.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: Can I import data from other platforms?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Absolutely. We support CSV, JSON, and direct API imports from
                    popular platforms. Our import wizard walks you through the process
                    step by step, and our team is available to help with large-scale
                    migrations.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Billing & Plans
          components:
          - name: accordion
            properties:
              behavior:
                allowMultipleOpen: false
              appearance:
                border:
                  position: bottom
                radius: sm
            items:
            - title: What plans do you offer?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: We offer three plans — Starter (free), Professional ($29/month),
                    and Enterprise (custom pricing). Each plan includes different
                    feature sets and usage limits. Annual billing saves you 20% compared
                    to monthly.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: How do I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: You can change your plan at any time from the Billing section
                    in your account settings. Upgrades take effect immediately with
                    prorated charges. Downgrades apply at the start of your next billing
                    cycle.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Yes, we offer a 50% discount on all paid plans for verified
                    nonprofit organizations and educational institutions. Contact
                    our sales team with proof of status to get your discount code.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: What happens if my payment fails?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: If a payment fails, we'll notify you via email and retry the
                    charge after 3 days. You'll have a 14-day grace period to update
                    your payment method before your account is downgraded to the free
                    tier. No data is ever deleted.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Technical Support
          components:
          - name: accordion
            properties:
              behavior:
                allowMultipleOpen: false
              appearance:
                border:
                  position: bottom
                radius: sm
            items:
            - title: How do I reset my password?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page and enter your email
                    address. You'll receive a password reset link within a few minutes.
                    The link expires after 24 hours for security. If you don't see
                    the email, check your spam folder.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: Why is the platform running slowly?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Performance issues are usually related to browser cache or
                    extensions. Try clearing your browser cache, disabling extensions,
                    or using an incognito window. If the issue persists, check our
                    status page for any ongoing incidents.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Navigate to Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication
                    and click "Enable." You can use an authenticator app like Google
                    Authenticator or Authy. We also support SMS verification as a
                    backup method.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: Do you have an API I can integrate with?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Yes, we offer a RESTful API available on Professional and
                    Enterprise plans. Full API documentation, SDKs for popular languages,
                    and webhooks are available in our developer portal. Rate limits
                    vary by plan.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'

- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: md

      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: FAQ
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#3b82f6'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Frequently Asked Questions
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#1e293b'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
        lineHeight: '1.2'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Find answers organized by category. Browse general questions on the left
        and technical questions on the right.
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        verticalAlign: top
        gap: lg
        wrap: nowrap
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          gap: md
          widthMode: '50'
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: General Questions
          level: 3
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: bold
            color: '#1e293b'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: xs
      - name: accordion
        properties:
          behavior:
            allowMultipleOpen: false
          appearance:
            border:
              position: bottom
            radius: sm
        items:
        - title: What is your product and who is it for?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Our platform is an all-in-one solution designed for teams of all
                sizes. Whether you are a solo freelancer, a growing startup, or an
                enterprise organization, our tools help you streamline workflows,
                collaborate effectively, and deliver results faster.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: How much does it cost?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: We offer a free tier for individuals, a Professional plan at $19/month,
                and an Enterprise plan with custom pricing. All paid plans come with
                a 14-day free trial. Annual billing gives you two months free compared
                to monthly billing.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Do you offer a money-back guarantee?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Yes, we offer a full 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.
                If our product does not meet your expectations, contact support within
                30 days and we will process a complete refund with no questions asked.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          gap: md
          widthMode: '50'
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'

# SECTION: Two-Column Accordion FAQ — Dual Category Side by Side Layout

content_with_context:
# SECTION: Two-Column Accordion FAQ — Dual Category Side by Side Layout
# Description: A two-column FAQ section using layout-row with two layout-columns each containing a categorized accordion, splitting General and Technical questions for organized browsing
# Section type: faq
# Layout: split_screen, grid
# Components: layout-row, layout-column, accordion, heading, paragraph, eyebrow
# Visual style: modern, card_based
# Perfect for: SaaS platform, online store, consulting firm, dental clinic, law firm, tutoring center, real estate agency, insurance company, software company, subscription service
# Source: faq_section/03_two_column_faq.yaml | Category: faq_section
# Theme: primary=#1e293b bg=#f8fafc font='Inter', sans-serif
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: md
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: FAQ
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#3b82f6'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Frequently Asked Questions
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#1e293b'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
        lineHeight: '1.2'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Find answers organized by category. Browse general questions on the left
        and technical questions on the right.
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        verticalAlign: top
        gap: lg
        wrap: nowrap
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          gap: md
          widthMode: '50'
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: General Questions
          level: 3
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: bold
            color: '#1e293b'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: xs
      - name: accordion
        properties:
          behavior:
            allowMultipleOpen: false
          appearance:
            border:
              position: bottom
            radius: sm
        items:
        - title: What is your product and who is it for?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Our platform is an all-in-one solution designed for teams of all
                sizes. Whether you are a solo freelancer, a growing startup, or an
                enterprise organization, our tools help you streamline workflows,
                collaborate effectively, and deliver results faster.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: How much does it cost?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: We offer a free tier for individuals, a Professional plan at $19/month,
                and an Enterprise plan with custom pricing. All paid plans come with
                a 14-day free trial. Annual billing gives you two months free compared
                to monthly billing.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
        - title: Do you offer a money-back guarantee?
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: Yes, we offer a full 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.
                If our product does not meet your expectations, contact support within
                30 days and we will process a complete refund with no questions asked.
              typography:
                size: sm
                color: '#64748b'
                lineHeight: '1.7'
    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: left
          gap: md
          widthMode: '50'
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
# ... (truncated, 1 total components)

content:
- name: site
  properties:
    theme:
      fonts:
        heading: '''Inter'', sans-serif'
        content: '''Inter'', sans-serif'
      colors:
        primary: '#1e293b'
        text: '#343A45'
        secondary: '#64748b'
        accent: '#3b82f6'
        background: '#f8fafc'
  components:
  - name: page
    slug: home
    title: 03 Two Column FAQ
    properties:
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#f8fafc'
      spacing:
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: layout-column
      properties:

          horizontalAlign: center
          gap: md
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#f8fafc'
            transparency: 100
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xxl
          paddingInline: lg
      components:
      - name: eyebrow
        properties:
          text: FAQ
          typography:
            size: xs
            weight: semibold
            color: '#3b82f6'
            transform: uppercase
            letterSpacing: wider
            align: center
      - name: heading
        properties:
          text: Frequently Asked Questions
          level: 2
          typography:
            size: xxxl
            weight: extrabold
            color: '#1e293b'
            align: center
            letterSpacing: tight
            lineHeight: '1.2'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Find answers organized by category. Browse general questions on the
            left and technical questions on the right.
          typography:
            size: md
            color: '#64748b'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
          layout:
            widthMode: '66'
      - name: layout-row
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: center
            verticalAlign: top
            gap: lg
            wrap: nowrap
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
          spacing:
            marginBlock: lg
        components:
        - name: layout-column
          properties:
            layout:
              horizontalAlign: left
              gap: md
              widthMode: '50'
            appearance:
              background:
                color: '#ffffff'
                transparency: 100
              radius: lg
              shadow: soft
            spacing:
              paddingBlock: lg
              paddingInline: lg
          components:
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: General Questions
              level: 3
              typography:
                size: lg
                weight: bold
                color: '#1e293b'
              spacing:
                marginBlock: xs
          - name: accordion
            properties:
              behavior:
                allowMultipleOpen: false
              appearance:
                border:
                  position: bottom
                radius: sm
            items:
            - title: What is your product and who is it for?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Our platform is an all-in-one solution designed for teams
                    of all sizes. Whether you are a solo freelancer, a growing startup,
                    or an enterprise organization, our tools help you streamline workflows,
                    collaborate effectively, and deliver results faster.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: How much does it cost?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: We offer a free tier for individuals, a Professional plan
                    at $19/month, and an Enterprise plan with custom pricing. All
                    paid plans come with a 14-day free trial. Annual billing gives
                    you two months free compared to monthly billing.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: Do you offer a money-back guarantee?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Yes, we offer a full 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid
                    plans. If our product does not meet your expectations, contact
                    support within 30 days and we will process a complete refund with
                    no questions asked.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
        - name: layout-column
          properties:
            layout:
              horizontalAlign: left
              gap: md
              widthMode: '50'
            appearance:
              background:
                color: '#ffffff'
                transparency: 100
              radius: lg
              shadow: soft
            spacing:
              paddingBlock: lg
              paddingInline: lg
          components:
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: Technical Questions
              level: 3
              typography:
                size: lg
                weight: bold
                color: '#1e293b'
              spacing:
                marginBlock: xs
          - name: accordion
            properties:
              behavior:
                allowMultipleOpen: false
              appearance:
                border:
                  position: bottom
                radius: sm
            items:
            - title: What are the system requirements?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Our platform is entirely cloud-based and runs in any modern
                    browser including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. No downloads
                    or plugins are required. We recommend a stable internet connection
                    and a screen resolution of at least 1280x720 for the best experience.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: Do you provide an API for integrations?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: Yes, we offer a comprehensive RESTful API available on Professional
                    and Enterprise plans. Our developer documentation includes SDKs
                    for JavaScript, Python, and Ruby, along with webhook support for
                    real-time event notifications.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'
            - title: How do you handle data security?
              components:
              - name: paragraph
                properties:
                  text: All data is encrypted at rest with AES-256 and in transit
                    with TLS 1.3. We are SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant.
                    Our infrastructure runs on AWS with automatic backups, and we
                    conduct regular third-party penetration testing.
                  typography:
                    size: sm
                    color: '#64748b'
                    lineHeight: '1.7'

metadata.template_title: Two-Column Accordion FAQ — Dual Category Side by Side Layout
metadata.template_description: A two-column FAQ section using layout-row with two layout-columns each containing a categorized accordion, splitting General and Technical questions for organized browsing
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, online store, consulting firm, dental clinic, law firm, tutoring center, real estate agency, insurance company, software company, subscription service
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, accordion, heading, paragraph, eyebrow

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      gap: md
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: HELP CENTER
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#7c3aed'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Frequently Asked Questions
      level: 2
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#1e293b'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
        lineHeight: '1.2'
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Browse our most commonly asked questions below. If you still need help,
        our support team is ready to assist you.
      typography:
        size: md
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
  - name: accordion
    properties:
      behavior:
        allowMultipleOpen: false
      appearance:
        border:
          position: bottom
        radius: sm
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
      layout:
        widthMode: '66'
    items:
    - title: How do I create an account?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Click the Sign Up button on our homepage and enter your email, name,
            and password. You will receive a verification email within minutes. Once
            verified, you can start using the platform immediately with access to
            all free-tier features.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: What payment methods do you accept?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: We accept all major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, and American
            Express. PayPal is also supported for all plans. Enterprise customers
            can pay via invoice with NET 30 terms. All transactions are processed
            securely through Stripe.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Yes, you can change your plan at any time from your account settings.
            Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing for the remainder
            of your cycle. Downgrades apply at the start of your next billing period
            and no data is ever lost.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: Is there a free trial available?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: Absolutely. Every paid plan includes a 14-day free trial with full
            access to all features. No credit card is required to start your trial.
            At the end of the period, you can choose a plan or continue with our generous
            free tier.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
    - title: How do I cancel my subscription?
      components:
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: You can cancel your subscription at any time from the Billing section
            in your account settings. There are no cancellation fees or long-term
            contracts. Your access continues until the end of your current billing
            period, and all your data remains available.
          typography:
            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            lineHeight: '1.7'
  - name: br
    properties:
      appearance:
        style: solid
        color: '#64748b'
        transparency: 20
      spacing:
# ... (truncated, 1 total components)

          lineHeight: '1.6'

          marginBlock: sm

          objectFit: cover
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md

    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: left
        gap: md

      appearance:
        background:

          properties:

              onboarding guide, and you will be set up in under five minutes. We also
              offer live onboarding sessions every weekday for new users who prefer
              a guided walkthrough.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'

        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: We integrate with over 100 popular tools including Slack, Google
              Workspace, Microsoft Teams, Salesforce, HubSpot, and Zapier. Our open
              API also lets you build custom integrations tailored to your specific
              workflow requirements.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#64748b'
              lineHeight: '1.7'
      - title: Can I try before I buy?
        components:

            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Yes, every paid plan comes with a 14-day free trial that gives
                  you full access to all features. No credit card is needed to start.
                  At the end of the trial you can select a plan or continue using
                  our free tier at no cost.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#64748b'
                  lineHeight: '1.7'
          - title: What level of support is included?
            components:
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: All plans include access to our help center and community forum.
                  Professional plans add priority email support with a four-hour response
                  guarantee. Enterprise customers get 24/7 phone support and a dedicated
                  customer success manager.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#64748b'
                  lineHeight: '1.7'
          - title: Is my data safe and private?
            components:
            - name: paragraph
              properties:
                text: Security is fundamental to our platform. We use AES-256 encryption
                  at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit, and maintain SOC 2 Type II certification.
                  We are fully GDPR compliant, perform regular penetration testing,
                  and never share your data with third parties.
                typography:
                  size: sm
                  color: '#64748b'
                  lineHeight: '1.7'

metadata.template_title: Tabbed Feature Categories Section — Organized Feature Showcase
metadata.template_description: A feature section using tabs component to organize features into categories with each tab containing a columnsgrid of feature cards with icons, headings, and descriptions
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, mobile app, software company, online store, consulting firm, logistics company, tutoring center, dental clinic, gym, digital agency
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, tabs, columnsgrid, layout-column, icon, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, image

content:
- name: carousel
  properties:
    behavior:
      autoplay: true
      delay: 3000
      loop: true
    navigation:
      showArrows: false
      showDots: false
    spacing:
      marginBlock: none
      marginInline: none
  slides:
  - components:
    - name: image
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/1763075/pexels-photo-1763075.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1920
          altText: Concert crowd with lights
        appearance:
          minHeight: 40
          fit: cover
          cornerStyle: none
          hoverEffect: zoom
        layout:
          widthMode: stretch
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            align: center
            horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          appearance:
            background:
              color: rgba(0,0,0,0.6)
              transparency: 100
          spacing:
            paddingBlock: xxxl
            paddingInline: lg
        components:
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              align: center
              horizontalAlign: space-evenly
            appearance:
              background:
                color: rgba(239,68,68,0.15)
                transparency: 100
              radius: pill
              border:
                width: 1
                style: solid
                color: rgba(239,68,68,0.3)
            spacing:
              paddingBlock: xs
              paddingInline: md
          components:
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: ●
              typography:
                color: '#ef4444'
                size: sm
              spacing:
                marginBlock: none
          - name: paragraph
            properties:
              text: LIVE EVENT
              typography:
                color: '#DFDFDF'
                size: xs
                weight: bold
                letterSpacing: wider
                transform: uppercase
              spacing:
                marginBlock: none
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: ELECTRIC NIGHTS
            level: 1
            typography:
              color: '#ffffff'
              size: xxxl
              weight: bold
              align: center
              letterSpacing: wide
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: FESTIVAL 2026
            level: 2
            typography:
              color: '#fbbf24'
              size: xxl
              weight: bold
              align: center
              letterSpacing: wide
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: AUGUST 15-17  •  CENTRAL PARK, NYC
            typography:
              color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8)
              size: md
              align: center
              letterSpacing: wide
            spacing:
              marginBlock: md
        - name: layout-row
          properties:
            layout:
              align: center
              horizontalAlign: space-evenly
              wrap: wrap
            spacing:
              marginBlock: lg
          components:
          - name: button
            properties:
              text: Get Tickets
              appearance:
                background:
                  type: gradient
                  gradient:
                    colorStart: '#fbbf24'
                    colorEnd: '#fbbf24'
                    direction: to right
                border:
                  width: 0
                  style: solid
                  color: transparent
                shadow: medium
                shadowColor: '#fbbf24'
              spacing:
                marginBlock: none
                paddingBlock: md
                paddingInline: xl
              typography:
                color: '#000000'

metadata.template_title: Video Background Style Hero Section
metadata.template_description: A dynamic above-fold hero simulating video background using auto-playing carousel with multiple full-screen slides, dark overlay, live event badge, large bold headline, date and location info, dual CTA buttons, and countdown timer — high-energy event landing page
metadata.template_use_cases: SaaS platform, online store, digital agency, law firm, consulting firm, dental clinic, real estate agency, restaurant, gym, photography studio
metadata.header_base_components: carousel, image, layout-column, layout-row, paragraph, heading, button

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#0f172a'
        transparency: 0
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: md
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        verticalAlign: center
        widthMode: '66'
        gap: sm
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: Urban Exploration
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          align: center
          color: '#818cf8'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wide
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Dubai City Skyline
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          align: center
          color: '#f8fafc'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Scroll through this stunning panoramic view of Dubai's iconic skyline,
          featuring the towering Burj Khalifa and the glittering cityscape along the
          waterfront.
        typography:
          size: md
          align: center
          color: '#94a3b8'
- name: panorama-display
  properties:
    source:
      url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/10549886/pexels-photo-10549886.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=3000&h=600&fit=crop
      altText: Panoramic view of Dubai city skyline with Burj Khalifa
    behavior:
      initialPosition: center
      autoScroll: false
      stepDistance: 400
      pauseOnHover: true
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
    appearance:
      radius: md
      shadow: dramatic
      shadowColor: '#1e293b'
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#0f172a'
        transparency: 0
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: sm
      paddingInline: md
  components:
  - name: caption
    properties:
      text: 'Use the arrows or drag to explore the full panorama

        Photo from Pexels - Free to use

        '
      typography:
        size: sm
        align: center
        color: '#64748b'
      layout:
        widthMode: fit
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 3
      gap: md
      verticalAlign: center
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 3
        sm: 1
    appearance:
      columnBackground: '#1e293b'
      columnRadius: md
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      paddingBlock: md
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: eye
        size: '32'
        color: '#818cf8'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Drag to Explore
        level: 4
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f8fafc'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Click and drag left or right to pan across the panoramic image.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#94a3b8'
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: arrow-left
        size: '32'
        color: '#818cf8'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Arrow Navigation
        level: 4
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f8fafc'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Use the left and right arrow buttons overlaid on the image for precise
          scrolling.
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#94a3b8'
  - components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: settings
        size: '32'
        color: '#818cf8'
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Initial Position
        level: 4
        typography:
          size: md
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f8fafc'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
