# Template: City Skyline Panorama Gallery with Interactive Navigation | Description: Dark-themed immersive panoramic viewer showcasing Dubai's skyline with drag-to-explore and arrow navigation, featuring an eyebrow/heading/description header, dramatic shadow styling, and a three-column instruction grid with icons explaining interaction modes | Section: gallery | Layout: stacked | Components: layout-row, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, panorama-display, caption, columnsgrid, icon | Use cases: real estate agency, hotel, travel agency, architecture firm, event venue, restaurant, resort, museum, shopping mall | Visual style: dark_mode
content_with_context:
# FULL PAGE: 01_city_skyline.yaml | primary=#f8fafc bg=#0f172a font='Inter', sans-serif
# Template: City Skyline Panorama Gallery with Interactive Navigation | Description: Dark-themed immersive panoramic viewer showcasing Dubai's skyline with drag-to-explore and arrow navigation, featuring an eyebrow/heading/description header, dramatic shadow styling, and a three-column instruction grid with icons explaining interaction modes | Section: gallery | Layout: stacked | Components: layout-row, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, panorama-display, caption, columnsgrid, icon | Use cases: real estate agency, hotel, travel agency, architecture firm, event venue, restaurant, resort, museum, shopping mall | Visual style: dark_mode
- name: site
  properties:
    theme:
      fonts:
        heading: '''Inter'', sans-serif'
        content: '''Inter'', sans-serif'
      colors:
        primary: '#f8fafc'
        text: '#DBDCDD'
        secondary: '#94a3b8'
        accent: '#818cf8'
        background: '#0f172a'
  components:
  - name: page
    properties:
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#0f172a'
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
          verticalAlign: center
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#0f172a'
            transparency: 0
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
          paddingInline: md
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: center
            verticalAlign: center
            widthMode: '66'
            gap: sm
          appearance:
            background:
              transparency: 0
        components:
        - name: eyebrow
          properties:
            text: Urban Exploration
            typography:
              size: xs
              weight: semibold
              align: center
              color: '#818cf8'
              transform: uppercase
              letterSpacing: wide
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Dubai City Skyline
            level: 1
            typography:
              size: xxl
              weight: bold
              align: center
              color: '#f8fafc'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Scroll through this stunning panoramic view of Dubai's iconic skyline,
              featuring the towering Burj Khalifa and the glittering cityscape along
              the waterfront.
            typography:
              size: md
              align: center
              color: '#94a3b8'
    - name: panorama-display
      properties:
        source:
          url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/10549886/pexels-photo-10549886.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=3000&h=600&fit=crop
          altText: Panoramic view of Dubai city skyline with Burj Khalifa
        behavior:
          initialPosition: center
          autoScroll: false
          stepDistance: 400
          pauseOnHover: true
        spacing:
          marginBlock: lg
        appearance:
          radius: md
          shadow: dramatic
          shadowColor: '#1e293b'
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
          verticalAlign: center
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#0f172a'
            transparency: 0
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: sm
          paddingInline: md
      components:
      - name: caption
        properties:
          text: 'Use the arrows or drag to explore the full panorama

            Photo from Pexels - Free to use

            '
          typography:
            size: sm
            align: center
            color: '#64748b'
          layout:
            widthMode: fit
    - name: columnsgrid
      properties:
        layout:
          columns: 3
          gap: md
          verticalAlign: center
        responsive:
          breakpoints:
            md: 3
            sm: 1
        appearance:
          columnBackground: '#1e293b'
          columnRadius: md
        spacing:
          marginBlock: lg
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: lg
      columns:
      - components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: eye
            size: '32'
            color: '#818cf8'
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Drag to Explore
            level: 4
            typography:
              size: md
              weight: semibold
              color: '#f8fafc'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Click and drag left or right to pan across the panoramic image.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#94a3b8'
      - components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: arrow-left
            size: '32'
            color: '#818cf8'
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Arrow Navigation
            level: 4
            typography:
              size: md
              weight: semibold
              color: '#f8fafc'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Use the left and right arrow buttons overlaid on the image for precise
              scrolling.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#94a3b8'
      - components:
        - name: icon
          properties:
            name: settings
            size: '32'
            color: '#818cf8'
        - name: heading
          properties:
            text: Initial Position
            level: 4
            typography:
              size: md
              weight: semibold
              color: '#f8fafc'
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: This panorama starts centered, showing the middle of the skyline
              first.
            typography:
              size: sm
              color: '#94a3b8'

metadata.template_title: City Skyline Panorama Gallery with Interactive Navigation
metadata.template_description: Dark-themed immersive panoramic viewer showcasing Dubai's skyline with drag-to-explore and arrow navigation, featuring an eyebrow/heading/description header, dramatic shadow styling, and a three-column instruction grid with icons explaining interaction modes
metadata.template_use_cases: real estate agency, hotel, travel agency, architecture firm, event venue, restaurant, resort, museum, shopping mall
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, eyebrow, heading, paragraph, panorama-display, caption, columnsgrid, icon

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#fafaf9'
        transparency: 0
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: md
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        verticalAlign: center
        widthMode: '66'
        gap: sm
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: badge
      properties:
        text: Virtual Tour
        variant: success
        pill: true
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Grand Mall Panorama
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          align: center
          color: '#1c1917'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Take a virtual stroll through our stunning multi-level shopping destination.
          Scroll to explore the architectural marvel and luxury retail spaces.
        typography:
          size: md
          align: center
          color: '#57534e'
- name: panorama-display
  properties:
    source:
      url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/15485843/pexels-photo-15485843.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=3000&h=600&fit=crop
      altText: Panoramic interior view of a modern multi-level shopping mall
    behavior:
      initialPosition: left
      autoScroll: true
      autoScrollSpeed: 15
      stepDistance: 300
      pauseOnHover: true
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
    appearance:
      radius: lg
      shadow: soft
      shadowColor: '#78716c'
      border:
        width: 1
        style: solid
        color: '#e7e5e4'
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 4
      gap: md
      verticalAlign: center
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 2
        sm: 1
    appearance:
      columnBackground: '#ffffff'
      columnRadius: md
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      paddingBlock: md
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: counter-up
      properties:
        endValue: 350
        suffix: +
        duration: 2000
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#059669'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Premium Stores
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: medium
          align: center
          color: '#57534e'
  - components:
    - name: counter-up
      properties:
        endValue: 5
        duration: 1500
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#059669'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Shopping Levels
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: medium
          align: center
          color: '#57534e'
  - components:
    - name: counter-up
      properties:
        endValue: 50
        suffix: +
        duration: 1800
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#059669'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Dining Options
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: medium
          align: center
          color: '#57534e'
  - components:
    - name: counter-up
      properties:
        endValue: 12
        prefix: ''
        suffix: K
        duration: 2200
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          color: '#059669'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Parking Spaces
        typography:
          size: sm
          weight: medium
          align: center
          color: '#57534e'
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#fafaf9'
        transparency: 0
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: md
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
# ... (truncated, 4 total components)

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#1a0a0a'
        transparency: 0
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: md
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        verticalAlign: center
        widthMode: '66'
        gap: sm
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: The Grand Stage
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          align: center
          color: '#f59e0b'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wide
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Royal Theater Panorama
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: bold
          align: center
          color: '#fef3c7'
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Experience the grandeur of a classic theater from your screen. Scroll
          through this immersive panoramic view of the auditorium, from the orchestra
          pit to the upper balconies.
        typography:
          size: md
          align: center
          color: '#d4a574'
- name: panorama-display
  properties:
    source:
      url: https://images.pexels.com/photos/109669/pexels-photo-109669.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=3000&h=600&fit=crop
      altText: Panoramic interior of an ornate Art Deco theater auditorium
    behavior:
      initialPosition: center
      autoScroll: false
      stepDistance: 350
      pauseOnHover: true
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
    appearance:
      radius: sm
      shadow: dramatic
      shadowColor: '#000000'
      border:
        width: 2
        style: solid
        color: '#92400e'
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      verticalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#1a0a0a'
        transparency: 0
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: md
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        widthMode: '75'
        gap: md
      appearance:
        background:
          transparency: 0
    components:
    - name: br
      properties:
        type: solid
        color: '#92400e'
        thickness: 1
    - name: blockquote
      properties:
        quote: 'The theater is so endlessly fascinating because it is so accidental.

          It is so much like life.

          '
        cite: Arthur Miller
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: medium
          align: center
          color: '#fef3c7'
        appearance:
          border:
            accentColor: '#f59e0b'
          background:
            transparency: 0
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: md
          paddingInline: md
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 3
      gap: md
      verticalAlign: stretch
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 3
        sm: 1
    appearance:
      columnBackground: '#2a1515'
      columnRadius: md
    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg
      paddingBlock: md
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:
  - components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: This Friday
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#f59e0b'
          align: center
          transform: uppercase
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: The Phantom
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: lg
          weight: bold
          color: '#fef3c7'
          align: center
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 7:30 PM - Orchestra & Balcony
        typography:
          size: sm
          color: '#d4a574'
          align: center
    - name: button
      properties:
        text: Book Tickets
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#92400e'

  - name: heading
    properties:

      typography:
        size: xxl
        weight: bold

        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm

  properties:

            background:

metadata.template_title: Appointment Slots - Booking Grid with Available Times
metadata.template_description: A booking section with time slot cards in a 3-column grid, featuring icons, availability status, badges, and book buttons
metadata.template_use_cases: dental clinic, salon, barbershop, yoga studio, fitness studio, conference, workshop, tutoring center, cooking class, music school
metadata.header_base_components: layout-column, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, columnsgrid, icon, badge, button

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
      tag: section
    spacing:
      marginBlock: none
      paddingBlock: xxl
      paddingInline: lg
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#0f0f1a'
        transparency: 100
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: GET IN TOUCH
      typography:
        color: '#a1a1aa'
        size: xs
        weight: medium
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
        transform: uppercase
      spacing:
        marginBlock: none
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Let's Connect
      level: 2
      typography:
        color: '#f8f6f3'
        size: xxl
        weight: bold
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Find me on your favorite platform
      typography:
        color: '#a1a1aa'
        size: md
        align: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: layout-row
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: space-evenly
        verticalAlign: center
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
    components:
    - name: link
      properties:
        text: Dribbble
        typography:
          color: '#e879f9'
          size: sm
          weight: medium
          lineHeight: '2.5'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: none
          marginInline: xs
        href: '#'
        layout:
          widthMode: fit
        appearance:
          underline: true
          showArrow: false

metadata.template_use_cases: creative agency, influencer, content creator, musician, artist
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, layout-column, heading, paragraph, button

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    appearance:
      background:
        type: gradient
        gradient:
          colorStart: '#EC4899'
          colorEnd: '#8B5CF6'
          direction: to bottom right
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: none
      paddingInline: none
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        gap: lg
      appearance: null
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xxxl
        paddingInline: lg
    components:
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: center
            tag: section
            verticalAlign: center
            wrap: nowrap
            gap: none
            widthMode: stretch
          appearance:
            background:
              type: gradient
              gradient:
                colorStart: '#C8D8F0'
                colorEnd: '#f0f0ff'
                direction: to right
              transparency: 30
            radius: pill
            shadow: none
            border:
              width: 0
              style: solid
              color: '#000000'
            blur: false
            shadowColor: '#000000'
          spacing:
            marginBlock: none
            marginInline: none
        components:
        - name: paragraph
          properties:
            text: Introducing Flow 2.0
            typography:
              color: '#EC4899'
              size: sm
              weight: medium
              align: left
              lineHeight: '1.6'
              transform: none
              letterSpacing: normal
              fontStyle: normal
              textDecoration: none
            layout:
              widthMode: fit
            appearance:
              background:
                type: ''
                color: '#ffffff'
                transparency: 0
            spacing:
              marginBlock: none
              marginInline: none
              paddingBlock: sm
              paddingInline: none
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Where colors come alive
        level: 1
        layout:
          widthMode: '75'
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          size: xxxl
          weight: bold
          align: center
          letterSpacing: tight
          lineHeight: snug
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'Experience design that moves and breathes. Flowing gradients,

          seamless transitions, and immersive color stories that captivate.

          '
        layout:
          widthMode: '50'
        typography:
          color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85)
          size: lg
          align: center
          lineHeight: relaxed
          weight: regular
    - name: columnsgrid
      properties:
        layout:
          columns: 3
          gap: md
        responsive:
          breakpoints:
            md: 2
            sm: 1
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
      columns:
      - components:
        - name: layout-column
          properties:
            layout:
              horizontalAlign: center
              gap: sm
            appearance:
              background:
                type: gradient
                gradient:
                  colorStart: '#EC4899'
                  colorEnd: '#F97316'
                  direction: to bottom right
                transparency: 100
              radius: lg
              shadow: none
              border:
                width: 0
            spacing:
              paddingBlock: lg
              paddingInline: md
          components:
          - name: heading
            properties:
              text: Create
              level: 3
              typography:
                color: '#ffffff'
                size: lg
                weight: bold

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: OUR TEAM
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#6366f1'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Meet the People Behind the Magic
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#1e293b'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: A passionate team of creators, strategists, and builders dedicated to
        delivering exceptional results for every client.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'
- name: columnsgrid
  properties:
    layout:
      columns: 4
      gap: xl
    responsive:
      breakpoints:
        md: 2
        sm: 1
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
  columns:

    - name: layout-column
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#ffffff'
            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: lg
          paddingInline: md
      components:
      - name: image
        properties:
          source:
            url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560250097-0b93528c311a?w=400&q=80
            altText: Portrait of David Chen, CEO
          appearance:
            fit: cover
            cornerStyle: pill
            aspectRatio: 1/1
            hoverEffect: lift
          layout:
            widthMode: '50'

        properties:
          text: David Chen
          level: 3
          typography:
            size: lg
            weight: bold
            color: '#1e293b'
            align: center
          spacing:
            marginBlock: sm
      - name: caption

            size: sm
            color: '#64748b'
            align: center

            marginBlock: sm

metadata.template_title: Team Photo Grid Section — Meet the Team
metadata.template_description: A team member showcase using columnsgrid with circular profile images, name headings, role captions, and short bios arranged in a responsive 4-column card grid layout
metadata.template_use_cases: digital agency, tech startup, consulting firm, law firm, restaurant, bakery, creative studio, architecture firm, dental clinic, accounting firm
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, columnsgrid, layout-column, image, heading, caption, paragraph, eyebrow

content:
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      wrap: nowrap
      verticalAlign: stretch
    appearance: null
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: none
      paddingInline: none
  components:
  - name: image
    properties:
      source:
        url: https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556157382-97eda2d62296?w=800&q=80
        altText: Portrait of company founder in office
      appearance:
        minHeight: 37.5
        fit: cover
        cornerStyle: none
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        widthMode: '50'
        horizontalAlign: start
      appearance:
        background:
          color: '#ffffff'
          transparency: 100
      spacing:
        paddingBlock: xxxl
        paddingInline: xl
    components:
    - name: eyebrow
      properties:
        text: OUR STORY
        typography:
          size: xs
          weight: semibold
          color: '#7c3aed'
          transform: uppercase
          letterSpacing: wider
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Founded on Passion
        level: 1
        typography:
          size: xxl
          weight: extrabold
          color: '#111827'
          letterSpacing: tight
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'What started as a simple idea in a small studio has grown into something

          we never imagined. In 2016, our founder Elena Vasquez left a comfortable

          corporate role to pursue a vision — building a company that puts people

          first and craftsmanship above all else.

          '
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#6b7280'
          lineHeight: '1.8'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: md
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: 'Today, we are a team of 40+ talented individuals serving clients across

          the globe. Our philosophy remains unchanged: every project deserves the

          same dedication and attention to detail that sparked this journey.

          '
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#6b7280'
          lineHeight: '1.8'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: sm
    - name: layout-row
      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: space-evenly
          wrap: wrap
          verticalAlign: center
        spacing:
          marginBlock: lg
      components:
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: center
            widthMode: '33'
        components:
        - name: counter-up
          properties:
            endValue: 10
            duration: 2000
            suffix: +
            typography:
              size: xxl
              weight: extrabold
              color: '#7c3aed'
              align: center
        - name: caption
          properties:
            text: Years Experience
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#6b7280'
              align: center
              weight: medium
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: center
            widthMode: '33'
        components:
        - name: counter-up
          properties:
            endValue: 250
            duration: 2500
            suffix: +
            typography:
              size: xxl
              weight: extrabold
              color: '#7c3aed'
              align: center
        - name: caption
          properties:
            text: Happy Clients
            typography:
              size: xs
              color: '#6b7280'
              align: center
              weight: medium
      - name: layout-column
        properties:
          layout:
            horizontalAlign: center
            widthMode: '33'
        components:
        - name: counter-up
          properties:
            endValue: 500
            duration: 2500
            suffix: +
            typography:
              size: xxl
# ... (truncated, 1 total components)

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: THE EXPERTS
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#0ea5e9'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Our Expert Team
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#0f172a'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: Talented professionals who bring expertise, creativity, and dedication
        to every project we take on.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'
- name: carousel
  properties:
    behavior:
      autoplay: true
      delay: 5000
      loop: true
      pauseOnHover: true
      swipeEnabled: true
      swipeThreshold: 50
      keyboardNavigation: true
    animation:
      effect: fade
      duration: 600
    navigation:
      showArrows: true
      arrowStyle: chevron
      arrowPosition: inside
      showDots: true

      style: dots
      position: bottom
    accessibility:
      showPauseButton: true

    spacing:
      marginBlock: lg

          horizontalAlign: center

            transparency: 100
          radius: lg
          shadow: soft

          paddingBlock: xl

        properties:
          text: Chief Executive Officer
          typography:
            size: sm

            align: center
            weight: semibold
      - name: paragraph
        properties:
          text: A seasoned entrepreneur with a track record of scaling startups from

            to client success.
          typography:
            size: md
            color: '#64748b'

            widthMode: '66'

      - name: layout-row

- name: site
  properties:

        primary: '#0f172a'
        text: '#2B2F3B'
        secondary: '#64748b'
        accent: '#0ea5e9'
        background: '#f1f5f9'

    components:

      properties:
        layout:
          horizontalAlign: center

          paddingInline: lg

        properties:
          text: THE EXPERTS

            letterSpacing: wider

      - name: heading

            weight: extrabold
            color: '#0f172a'

            to every project we take on.

            align: center
          layout:
            widthMode: '75'

metadata.template_title: Team Member Carousel Section — Sliding Team Showcase
metadata.template_description: A team showcase using carousel slides with each slide containing a team member profile card featuring image, name heading, role caption, and social media icons
metadata.template_use_cases: digital agency, tech startup, consulting firm, law firm, restaurant, bakery, creative studio, architecture firm, dental clinic, accounting firm
metadata.header_base_components: layout-row, carousel, layout-column, image, heading, caption, paragraph, icon, eyebrow

content:
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: center
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xl
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: eyebrow
    properties:
      text: OUR JOURNEY
      typography:
        size: xs
        weight: semibold
        color: '#2563eb'
        transform: uppercase
        letterSpacing: wider
        align: center
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Company Milestones
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: extrabold
        color: '#1e293b'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: sm
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: From a bold idea to a thriving company — here are the moments that shaped
        who we are today.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#64748b'
        align: center
      layout:
        widthMode: '75'
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      align: center
      horizontalAlign: center
      wrap: wrap
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#f8fafc'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        widthMode: '16'
    components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: rocket
        size: '48'
        color: '#2563eb'
    - name: badge
      properties:
        text: '2018'
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#2563eb'
          radius: pill
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xs
          paddingInline: md
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: bold
          size: sm
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: start
        widthMode: '66'
      spacing:
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: The Beginning
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#1e293b'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Founded in a small co-working space with just three people and a shared
          dream. We launched our first product and signed our initial five clients
          within the first quarter.
        typography:
          size: md
          color: '#64748b'
          lineHeight: '1.7'
- name: br
  properties:
    appearance:
      color: '#e2e8f0'
      style: solid
      width: 1
    spacing:
      marginBlock: none
    layout:
      widthMode: '75'
- name: layout-row
  properties:
    layout:
      align: center
      horizontalAlign: center
      wrap: wrap
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#ffffff'
        transparency: 100
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: lg
      paddingInline: lg
  components:
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: center
        widthMode: '16'
    components:
    - name: icon
      properties:
        name: trending-up
        size: '48'
        color: '#10b981'
    - name: badge
      properties:
        text: '2020'
        appearance:
          background:
            color: '#10b981'
          radius: pill
        spacing:
          paddingBlock: xs
          paddingInline: md
        typography:
          color: '#ffffff'
          weight: bold
          size: sm
  - name: layout-column
    properties:
      layout:
        horizontalAlign: start
        widthMode: '66'
      spacing:
        paddingInline: md
    components:
    - name: heading
      properties:
        text: Rapid Growth
        level: 3
        typography:
          size: xl
          weight: bold
          color: '#1e293b'
        spacing:
          marginBlock: xs
    - name: paragraph
      properties:
        text: Expanded the team to 20 members and opened our first dedicated office.
          Secured Series A funding and grew our client base to over 100 companies
# ... (truncated, 9 total components)

metadata.template_title: Ecommerce Titlebar - Dark Online Store Header
metadata.template_description: A sleek dark-mode ecommerce titlebar with logo, store navigation, and shop CTA, followed by a featured product hero
metadata.template_use_cases: consulting firm, law firm, online store, fashion brand, photography studio, design portfolio, creative studio, wellness spa
metadata.header_base_components: titlebar, layout-column, layout-row, heading, paragraph, eyebrow, button, image

content:
- name: titlebar
  properties:
    branding:
      showLogo: false
      title: Aurora Studio
    navigation:
      links:
      - label: Work
        href: '#work'
      - label: About
        href: '#about'
      - label: Contact
        href: '#contact'
    layout:
      alignment: center
      height: 60
    scroll:
      shrinkPercentage: 85
    appearance:
      background:
        color: '#E6F0FA'
        transparency: 50
      border:
        width: 0
      focus:
        background: '#E6F0FA'
        color: '#EC4899'
    typography:
      title:
        size: 20
        weight: bold
        color: '#1A2035'
      menu:
        size: 14
        weight: regular
        color: '#1A2035'
- name: layout-column
  properties:
    layout:
      horizontalAlign: space-evenly
    appearance:
      background:
        type: gradient
        gradient:
          colorStart: '#E6F0FA'
          colorEnd: '#C8D8F0'
          direction: to bottom right
    spacing:
      paddingBlock: xxxl
      paddingInline: xl
  components:
  - name: heading
    properties:
      text: Design That Speaks
      level: 1
      typography:
        size: xxxl
        weight: bold
        color: '#1A2035'
        align: center
        letterSpacing: tight
      spacing:
        marginBlock: md
        paddingBlock: md
        paddingInline: xl
  - name: paragraph
    properties:
      text: We craft digital experiences that connect brands with their audience through
        thoughtful, intentional design.
      typography:
        size: lg
        color: '#313541'
        align: center
        lineHeight: '1.8'
      layout:
        widthMode: 66
      spacing:
        marginBlock: lg
  - name: button
    properties:
      text: View Our Work
      appearance:
        background:
          type: gradient
          gradient:
            colorStart: '#EC4899'
            colorEnd: '#8B5CF6'
            direction: to right
        radius: pill
      typography:
        color: '#ffffff'
        weight: semibold
        size: md
